query:
SELECT date, type, description, COUNT(*) as count
FROM events
WHERE type LIKE '%nata%'
GROUP BY date, type, description
HAVING count > 1
ORDER BY date
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 1grUzB66oStVVFP.root --database gPiHJoB3NKeoE8WP6B5f8y --execute SELECT date, type, description, COUNT(*) as count
FROM events
WHERE type LIKE '%nata%'
GROUP BY date, type, description
HAVING count > 1
ORDER BY date
LIMIT 10;
